User.title: User Profile
User.description: Public and private information for registered dental patients and dentists

uid.description: Unique user ID from Firebase Auth

createdAt.description: Timestamp when user profile was created

DentalState.title: Patient Dental State
DentalState.description: Detailed diagnosis metrics for all 32 teeth of a user

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this dental state

teeth.description: Dynamic teeth metrics map index to tooth conditions

/users/{userId}/dentalState/current.description: The current verified or custom modified dental state of the user
